name: Apache APISIX
description: Apache APISIX is a dynamic, high-performance API gateway. This container installs APISIX with local etcd by default, or can point APISIX at custom external etcd hosts using APISIX_ETCD_HOSTS.

notes.text: The Admin API listens on port 9180, the control API on 9092, and Prometheus metrics on 9091. The generated admin key is stored in /usr/local/apisix/conf/config.yaml.

Set APISIX_ETCD_HOSTS to a comma-separated list such as http://etcd1.intra.ryanbuu.dev:2379,http://etcd2.intra.ryanbuu.dev:2379,http://etcd3.intra.ryanbuu.dev:2379 to use external etcd instead of the local etcd service.
Optional overrides: APISIX_ADMIN_KEY, APISIX_ETCD_PREFIX, and APISIX_ETCD_TIMEOUT.
